svg.title: System workflow diagram
svg.desc: Luồng từ Strategist tạo strategy, qua Marketplace, đến AI Agent chạy 24/7 monitoring và thực thi

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Who is the Strategist in this system?')
sendPrompt('What does Ollama AI do in strategy creation?')
sendPrompt('What does the AI Builder do?')
sendPrompt('How does natural language input work here?')
sendPrompt('How does Ollama AI Analysis work?')
sendPrompt('How does Strategy NFT minting work?')
sendPrompt('What does the investor see when browsing?')
sendPrompt('What happens when an investor selects a strategy?')
sendPrompt('How is the AI agent activated?')
sendPrompt('What does LP Agent API provide to the system?')
sendPrompt('How does the blockchain interact with execution?')
sendPrompt('What data sources feed real-time analysis?')
sendPrompt('How does Zap In/Out execution work?')
sendPrompt('What is updated in the portfolio after execution?')
